title: Black Tusk
summary: An advanced private military faction that sabotages the Division Network, invades Washington and pursues national control through high-end weapons and robotics.

claims.text: The official story recap identifies Black Tusk as a private military group that enters Washington and places the city under siege.
Black Tusk sabotaged the nationwide Division Network as part of a campaign to undermine SHD and seize control of the country.
Ubisoft describes Black Tusk operators as using high-end weapons, turret drones, robotic gun platforms and other advanced armaments.

paragraphs.text: Black Tusk changes the strategic situation after the initial Washington campaign: the group arrives as an organized invading force rather than another local militia.
Their battlefield identity is built around trained operators, high-end weapons and autonomous or robotic support platforms.

verification.notes: Command structure and current seasonal leadership are intentionally deferred pending a later-canon source review.
